title: Profile Stats Expanded
text:
Your player profile now shows seven new performance charts:

  • Activity heatmap — a full year of play history at a glance
  • Points by round position — are you stronger in R1, R2, or R3?
  • Points by day of week — your best and worst days
  • Improvement trend — early vs. recent average to track progress
  • Perfect days — how often every round scored 5 pts
  • Guess bias — whether you tend to overshoot or undershoot
  • Best & worst bucket — which price ranges you nail and which trip you up

Visit your profile to see them.
footer: All charts update automatically as you keep playing.

title: Seasons Are Live! 🏁
text:
Seasons have arrived in Steam5! Leaderboards now reset on a schedule, giving new challengers a fresh shot at the podium while long-term players chase seasonal awards.

Here’s what’s new:

  • Time-gated Seasons: Every X days we close the season, hand out awards, and immediately kick off the next one.
  • Auto Awards: Top performers earn badges for Most Points, Most Hits, Highest Avg Points/Day, and Longest Streak — with configurable podium depth.
  • Retro Backfill: We can retroactively generate past seasons so historical play counts too.
  • Seasons Page: Visit /seasons to see the current timeline and all past winners.
  • Profile Highlights: Player pages show every seasonal award you’ve earned.

We’ll keep tuning categories, tie-breakers, and visuals based on your feedback. Jump in, push for a streak, and grab those medals!
footer: Thanks for testing Seasons early — let us know what awards you want to see next!

text:

Here’s to the next big milestones and even more fun rounds!
footer: Half a thousand days — you’re amazing! See you tomorrow.

title: Game Statistics
text:
We've added a new Game Statistics section to the archive page! Check out interesting stats about the game:

  • Total rounds played: See how many rounds we've completed together
  • Top 10 games by review count: Discover which games had the most reviews
  • Best and worst days: Find out which days had the highest and lowest average user scores
footer: Explore the archive to see all the statistics!

title: Understanding Bucket Pick Strategies
text:
Each day, Steam5 randomly selects a bucket pick strategy that determines which review count ranges the games will come from. Here's how each strategy works:

  • RANDOM: Each bucket has an equal chance of being picked for each round.
  • EQUAL: Picks are evenly distributed across all buckets (one per bucket when rounds match bucket count).
  • LEAN_HIGH: Higher probability of picking games from buckets with more reviews.
  • LEAN_LOW: Higher probability of picking games from buckets with fewer reviews.
  • LEAN_CENTER: Higher probability of picking games from the middle bucket.
  • HIGH: Multiple picks are reserved from the top two buckets (high review counts).
  • LOW: Multiple picks are reserved from the bottom two buckets (low review counts).
  • CENTER: Multiple picks are reserved from the center bucket.

The strategy chosen each day is hidden, so you'll need to adapt your guessing strategy based on the games you see!
footer: Tip: Pay attention to the review counts of games each day to infer which strategy might be active.

title: Achievements
text:
We've added achievements to the leaderboards! Top players can earn special badges:

  • Bullseye 🎯: Most perfect rounds (points = 5)
  • Cheetah 🐆: Least time between first and last guess per day (summed across the timeframe)
  • Early Bird ☀: Plays the earliest on average
  • Night Owl 🌙: Plays the latest on average
  • Perfect Day 🎩: Most days with perfect total points
  • Sharpshooter 🔫: Highest average points per guess
  • Sloth 🦥: Most time between first and last guess per day (summed across the timeframe)

The speed-based achievements (Cheetah and Sloth) measure how quickly (or slowly) you complete all rounds each day. For weekly, monthly, and all-time leaderboards, we sum up the daily time differences.
footer: Check the leaderboards to see who earned these achievements!

title: New Speed Achievements
text:
We've added two new speed-based achievements to the leaderboards:

  • Cheetah 🐆: Least time between first and last guess per day (summed across the timeframe)
  • Sloth 🦥: Most time between first and last guess per day (summed across the timeframe)

These achievements measure how quickly (or slowly) you complete all rounds each day. For weekly, monthly, and all-time leaderboards, we sum up the daily time differences.
footer: Check the leaderboards to see who earned these new achievements!

title: New Monthly Leaderboard
text:
We've added a new monthly leaderboard! Check out how you rank over the past 30 days.

Both monthly and weekly leaderboards now use rolling periods instead of calendar periods:

  • Monthly: Last 30 days
  • Weekly: Last 7 days (previously calendar week)
footer: This makes it easier to see your recent performance at any time!

title: New Achievements
text:

footer: Check the leaderboards to see who earned these achievements!

title: Why Sign In?
text:
Signing in unlocks a few benefits:

  • Leaderboard tracking: see your rank on daily, weekly and all-time boards.
  • Fair play: everyone can submit only one guess per round, helping prevent cheating.
  • Feedback & popularity: your participation helps us gauge interest and improve the game.
footer: Thanks for playing and supporting the project! <3

title: New Bucket Strategies
text:
To prevent users from guessing the last pick with certainty, we have implemented new 'bucket' strategies. The game will choose one strategy randomly each day and pick games accordingly.

  • RANDOM: Uniform chance for each bucket per round.
  • EQUAL: Evenly spread picks across buckets (exactly one per bucket when rounds match buckets).
  • LEAN_HIGH: Higher probability for higher-review buckets.
  • LEAN_LOW: Higher probability for lower-review buckets.
  • LEAN_CENTER: Higher probability for the center bucket.
  • HIGH: Reserves multiple picks from the top two buckets.
  • LOW: Reserves multiple picks from the bottom two buckets.
  • CENTER: Reserves multiple picks from the single center bucket.
footer: The actual strategy chosen will be hidden. We hope you enjoy the new strategies! Please let us know if you have any feedback.

title: Customize Fonts & Theme
text: You can now switch the font family and light/dark theme from the footer. Your choices are saved on your device.
footer: Tip: Try Krypton, Neon, Argon, Radon, or Xenon in the font selector.

title: New Review Buckets
text: We have updated the review buckets to be more fair. Simply choosing 1-100 wont work anymore 😏.
footer: Tip: Every bucket matches exactly one game per day.

title: New Archive
text: We've added a new archive of all the daily challenges.
footer: A link to the archive can also be found in the footer of every page.
